tldr_zh: 馬斯克敗訴OpenAI，Google I/O聚焦AI，頂尖人才跳槽Anthropic，資安事件頻傳。
tldr_en: Musk loses OpenAI suit, Google I/O highlights AI, top talent moves to Anthropic, and major cybersecurity incidents occur.

items.title_zh: 馬斯克控告OpenAI訴訟敗訴，法院裁定提告過晚
items.title_en: Elon Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Court Rules Claims Barred by Statute of Limitations
items.summary_zh: 伊隆·馬斯克控告OpenAI及其共同創辦人違反合約的訴訟，陪審團一致裁定馬斯克提告過晚，其主張已超過訴訟時效。此判決對馬斯克造成重大打擊，他已表示將提出上訴。
items.summary_en: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its co-founders for breach of contract was unanimously dismissed by a jury, ruling that Musk filed the suit too late and his claims are barred by the statute of limitations. This verdict is a significant blow to Musk, who has announced plans to appeal.

items.title_zh: Google I/O 2026登場，Gemini與AI代理功能成焦點
items.title_en: Google I/O 2026 Kicks Off, Gemini and AI Agent Features Take Center Stage
items.summary_zh: Google年度開發者大會I/O 2026今日開幕，預計將重點展示其AI模型Gemini的新版本及更多代理式AI功能。這場盛會將揭示Google在基礎模型競賽中如何強化其AI實力。
items.summary_en: Google's annual developer conference, I/O 2026, commenced today, with expectations for new versions of its Gemini AI models and more agentic AI features to be prominently featured. The event is set to highlight Google's efforts to strengthen its position in the foundational model race.

items.title_en: OpenAI Co-founder Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic's Pre-training Team
items.summary_zh: OpenAI共同創辦人之一的知名AI研究員Andrej Karpathy已加入Anthropic的預訓練團隊，負責大型模型的核心知識與能力訓練。此舉被視為頂尖AI人才在主要AI公司間流動的重要動向。
items.summary_en: Andrej Karpathy, a renowned AI researcher and co-founder of OpenAI, has joined Anthropic's pre-training team, which is responsible for training the core knowledge and capabilities of large-scale models. This move is seen as a significant talent shift among leading AI companies.

items.title_zh: Meta與Anduril合作開發軍用智慧眼鏡，支援無人機打擊
items.title_en: Meta and Anduril Collaborate on Military Smart Glasses for Drone Strikes
items.summary_zh: 國防科技公司Anduril與Meta合作，正在為軍方原型開發一款擴增實境頭戴裝置，其願景是透過眼球追蹤和語音指令來指揮無人機打擊。這項技術旨在提升戰場上的態勢感知與作戰效率。
items.summary_en: Defense tech company Anduril, in collaboration with Meta, is prototyping an augmented reality headset for the military, with a vision for ordering drone strikes via eye-tracking and voice commands. This technology aims to enhance situational awareness and operational efficiency on the battlefield.

items.title_zh: Cursor發布Composer 2.5新模型，強化程式開發代理表現
items.title_en: Cursor Releases New Composer 2.5 Model, Enhancing Code Development Agent Performance
items.summary_zh: 程式開發代理模型Cursor推出Composer 2.5更新，顯著改善了長時間任務處理、複雜指令遵循與協作開發表現。新模型讓AI在多步驟程式開發中更能維持任務進度，提升開發效率。
items.summary_en: Cursor has released Composer 2.5, an updated AI agent model for code development, significantly improving its performance in handling long-duration tasks, following complex instructions, and collaborative development. The new model helps AI maintain task progress in multi-step programming, boosting development efficiency.

items.title_zh: AI輔助漏洞發掘影響浮現，Chrome漏洞揭露量激增563%
items.title_en: AI-Assisted Vulnerability Discovery Emerges, Chrome CVE Disclosures Surge 563%
items.summary_zh: 漏洞情資業者VulnCheck分析指出，2026年以來多家軟體供應商的CVE揭露數量顯著增加，其中Google Chrome年增563.2%。這波變化被認為與AI輔助漏洞發掘工具的成熟趨勢相符，顯示AI正改變資安領域。
items.summary_en: Vulnerability intelligence firm VulnCheck reports a significant increase in CVE disclosures from multiple software vendors since 2026, with Google Chrome seeing a 563.2% year-over-year surge. This trend is attributed to the maturing of AI-assisted vulnerability discovery tools, indicating AI's growing impact on cybersecurity.

items.title_zh: Redis推出Iris情境引擎，強化AI代理即時資料整合
items.title_en: Redis Launches Iris Context Engine, Enhancing Real-time Data Integration for AI Agents
items.summary_zh: 即時資料平臺業者Redis發布AI代理情境與記憶解決方案Redis Iris，作為代理與企業資料間的情境引擎。Iris讓AI代理在執行任務時能取得即時且可用的資料，解決傳統資料整合的痛點。
items.summary_en: Real-time data platform provider Redis has launched Redis Iris, a context and memory solution for AI agents, acting as a context engine between agents and enterprise data. Iris enables AI agents to access real-time and usable data during task execution, addressing traditional data integration challenges.

items.title_zh: 蘋果強化輔助使用功能，導入AI處理支援Vision Pro
items.title_en: Apple Enhances Accessibility Features with AI Processing, Supporting Vision Pro
items.summary_zh: 蘋果年度輔助使用功能更新，為iPhone、Mac及Vision Pro帶來多項新功能，重點在於利用裝置內建AI處理。這些AI驅動的功能將提升VoiceOver、放大鏡、語音控制等工具的效能，讓更多用戶受益。
items.summary_en: Apple's annual accessibility feature update introduces new additions for iPhone, Mac, and especially Vision Pro, with a focus on leveraging on-device AI processing. These AI-powered features will enhance tools like VoiceOver, Magnifier, and Voice Control, benefiting a wider range of users.

items.title_zh: 美國性別深偽影像打擊法規生效，專家憂審查風險
items.title_en: US Deepfake Crackdown Law Takes Full Effect, Experts Warn of Censorship Risks
items.summary_zh: 美國一項要求社群網路迅速移除性別深偽影像及其他非自願性親密圖像的法律已全面生效。然而，專家警告此政策對受害者幫助有限，甚至可能助長網路審查。
items.summary_en: A US law requiring social networks to promptly remove sexual deepfakes and other nonconsensual intimate imagery is now fully in force. However, experts warn that the policy may offer little help to victims and could, at worst, facilitate online censorship.

items.title_zh: 大規模供應鏈攻擊，數十個開源套件遭駭客入侵
items.title_en: Dozens of Popular Open Source Packages Compromised in Supply Chain Attack
items.summary_zh: 一場名為「Mini Shai-Hulud」的大規模供應鏈攻擊，已導致數十個熱門開源套件遭駭客入侵。這波攻擊影響了使用這些套件的開發者和公司，凸顯開源軟體供應鏈的資安風險。
items.summary_en: Dozens of popular open-source packages have been compromised by hackers in an ongoing supply chain attack known as "Mini Shai-Hulud." This campaign affects developers and companies using these packages, highlighting the security risks within the open-source software supply chain.

items.title_zh: 美國網路安全局CISA外洩大量密碼與雲端金鑰
items.title_en: US Cyber Agency CISA Exposed Passwords and Cloud Keys to the Open Web
items.summary_zh: 根據獨立記者報告，美國聯邦網路安全機構CISA將包含純文字密碼和雲端金鑰的試算表上傳至公共GitHub儲存庫，導致大量敏感資訊外洩。這起事件凸顯了即使是資安機構也可能面臨的內部風險。
items.summary_en: A report by an independent journalist revealed that the US federal cybersecurity agency CISA uploaded a spreadsheet containing plaintext passwords and cloud keys to a public GitHub repository, exposing a large amount of sensitive information. This incident highlights the internal risks even cybersecurity agencies can face.

items.title_zh: 剛果伊波拉疫情擴散，世衛組織憂心規模與速度
items.title_en: Congo Reports More Ebola Cases, WHO Expresses Concern Over Outbreak's Scale and Speed
items.summary_zh: 剛果民主共和國持續報告更多伊波拉病例，世界衛生組織對疫情的規模和傳播速度表示擔憂。官員警告，這次致命病毒的爆發可能持續相當長時間，並正評估潛在的疫苗和療法。
items.summary_en: The Democratic Republic of Congo continues to report more Ebola cases, with the World Health Organization expressing concern over the outbreak's scale and speed. Officials warn that this deadly virus outbreak could persist for a considerable time and are evaluating potential vaccines and treatments.
